name: Optimize note-enabled large split stream scroll cost

description: Baseline note-enabled large split-stream scroll benchmark on PR branch before optimization; current 18-tick note-enabled scroll cost is 16406.23ms and still shows act warnings from deferred highlight work.

Attempted to scope visible agent notes to the selected hunk and keep windowing active with notes, but the updated interaction test expected the wrong navigation path and the experiment failed before benchmarking.

Scope visible agent notes to the selected hunk and keep placeholder windowing active for the rest of the review stream; note-enabled 18-tick scroll drops from 16406.23ms to 647.48ms while the interaction test now follows notes as focus moves.

Count visible inline note rows in split-mode section metrics so placeholder windowing keeps accurate heights for the selected note-bearing file; note-enabled 18-tick scroll drops from 647.48ms to 231.25ms and the section-height helper now has note-row coverage.
